subcodes.first_line: O Karim! Hearken unto the call of the All-Bountiful, Who remembereth thee whilst imprisoned in this mighty fortress [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا کریم ان استمع ندآء الکریم انه یذکرک اذ کان مسجونا فی هذا الحصن المتین قد
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
